summary: W1473 refines the W1472 W987 construction by replacing the raw strict-representative lift blueprint with its object strict-preimage data family, map strict-preimage data family, map identity law, and map composition law. It reconstructs the raw lift blueprint from those four fields, feeds the resulting W1472 input, and lets W1472 reconstruct the normalized lift blueprint while reassembling W519, W973, W945, W730, W986, and W987. Product success remains false because no positive OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess witness exists and the final imported original four-task completion surface still proves productSuccessClaimed=false.
known_gaps: Positive Lean witness is absent: ProductSuccessDeclarations.lean does not import or check an OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess surface with field-level evidence for the four original tasks.
Final imported completion surface remains nonterminal: originalFourTaskContractCompletion.productSuccessClaimed = false still compiles.

Original four mathematical tasks remain open under the positive-witness supplement; W1473 reconstructs the W987 route from forty-four assumed inputs, including raw boundary fields, raw relation fields, target-difference surjectivity and target-codomain compact no-univ membership primitive families, three W714 selected-difference closed-embedding diagram component fields, a raw mapped explicit cokernel closed-embedding field, raw strict-preimage object and map data plus identity and composition laws for the lift blueprint, fixed-target uniqueness, source-triangulation fields, endpoint kernel/cokernel-top fields, localized right-adjoint object and morphism maps plus identity and composition laws, localized adjunction unit/counit component and naturality fields, localized adjunction left/right triangle component identity fields, unit-mapping-cone kernel/cokernel-top fields, and unit-mapping-cone iso hom/inv/identity fields rather than proving those inputs from a positive product witness.
